## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`mypy temper_ai/`)
- [ ] New code has docstrings and type hints
- [ ] YAML config changes are backward-compatible
- [ ] No secrets or API keys in the diff
- [ ] Updated relevant docs (if applicable)
